scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run server --prefix backend" "npm run server --prefix langchain" "ollama serve" "npm run zap"
scripts.dev:nozap: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run server --prefix backend" "npm run server --prefix langchain" "ollama serve"
scripts.zap: cd "backend/services/Zed Attack Proxy" && java -Xmx4g -jar zap-2.17.0.jar -daemon -port 8080 -config api.key=123 -config callhome.optin=false
